title: clutia pulchella var. genuina
intro: Clutia pulchella var. genuina, also known as the Clutia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Africa and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clutia pulchella var. genuina include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for snake bites and other venomous bites. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
